requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Environmental Derating for Norway PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及挪威光伏逆变器环境降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及挪威光伏逆變器環境降額

summary.en: For Norway solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. SN (Standards Norway) is the national standards body, NVE oversees the energy sector, and Statnett controls the practical grid-connection interface for transmission-connected installations; project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Norway is an EEA member and applies CE directives via the EEA Agreement; LVD 2014/35/EU conformity is required. Unlike the Mediterranean coastal markets, Norway presents cold-weather and high-humidity challenges, particularly in coastal western Norway and offshore/fjord environments where corrosion from salt-mist exposure is a concern. Safety files should address enclosure ingress protection, corrosion-resistant materials, terminal temperature rise, ventilation, low-temperature operation, and derating for cold, high-humidity, and maritime exposure.
summary.zh: 对于挪威太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备。SN（挪威标准）是国家标准机构，NVE监管能源行业，Statnett控制输电接入的并网接口；项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。挪威为EEA成员，通过EEA协议适用CE指令；须符合低电压指令2014/35/EU。与地中海沿海市场不同，挪威面临寒冷和高湿挑战，尤其是在挪威西部沿海及离岸/峡湾环境中，盐雾暴露带来腐蚀隐患。安全文件应说明外壳防护等级、耐腐蚀材料、端子温升、通风、低温运行以及针对寒冷、高湿和海洋暴露的降额。
summary.zht: 對於挪威太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備。SN（挪威標準）是國家標準機構，NVE監管能源行業，Statnett控制輸電接入的併網介面；項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。挪威為EEA成員，通過EEA協議適用CE指令；須符合低電壓指令2014/35/EU。與地中海沿海市場不同，挪威面臨寒冷和高濕挑戰，尤其是在挪威西部沿海及離岸/峽灣環境中，鹽霧暴露帶來腐蝕隱患。安全文件應說明外殼防護等級、耐腐蝕材料、端子溫升、通風、低溫運行以及針對寒冷、高濕和海洋暴露的降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LVD 2014/35/EU (applicable in Norway via EEA Agreement)
SN standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
NVE and Statnett project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Project environmental requirements for cold-weather, high-humidity, coastal corrosion, ingress protection, and thermal derating in Norwegian fjord and maritime environments

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Norway projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Norway project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and Norwegian environmental exposure (cold weather, high humidity, coastal corrosion).
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为挪威项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而挪威项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件及挪威环境暴露（寒冷气候、高湿度、沿海腐蚀）。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為挪威項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而挪威項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件及挪威環境暴露（寒冷氣候、高濕度、沿海腐蝕）。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Norway IEC safety expectations. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals match the Norway configuration, document protection coordination and earthing, and add environmental evidence for cold-weather operation, low-temperature start-up, ingress protection, humidity, corrosion resistance in fjord/coastal environments, and thermal derating. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Norway can require updated safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足挪威IEC安全要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，确认标签和手册匹配挪威配置，记录保护配合和接地，并补充寒冷气候运行、低温启动、外壳防护、湿度、峡湾/沿海腐蚀环境和热降额环境证据。针对挪威对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足挪威IEC安全要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊匹配挪威配置，記錄保護配合和接地，並補充寒冷氣候運行、低溫啟動、外殼防護、濕度、峽灣/沿海腐蝕環境和熱降額環境證據。針對挪威對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where SN, NVE, Statnett, EPC, lender, insurer, or project-owner documentation requires IEC 62109 safety evidence for grid-connected PV inverters; LVD 2014/35/EU CE marking required via EEA Agreement
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Norway/EEA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Norway PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, align labels and manuals to Norway's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, and document cold-weather operation, high-humidity, ingress-protection, corrosion resistance in fjord/coastal environments, and thermal-derating controls. Confirm current SN, NVE, Statnett, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 挪威光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，使标签和手册匹配挪威230/400 V、50 Hz配置，并记录寒冷气候运行、高湿度、防护等级、峡湾/沿海腐蚀环境和热降额控制。出货前请确认现行SN、NVE、Statnett及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 挪威光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，使標籤和手冊匹配挪威230/400 V、50 Hz配置，並記錄寒冷氣候運行、高濕度、防護等級、峽灣/沿海腐蝕環境和熱降額控制。出貨前請確認現行SN、NVE、Statnett及項目業主安全要求。
